claims.text: Transcription factors regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms.
claims.source_quote: Transcription factors (TFs) regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms.

claims.text: Many transcription factors act together, but the logic underlying TF binding and their interactions is not fully understood.
claims.source_quote: While many TFs act together, the logic underlying TFs binding and their interactions is not fully understood yet.

claims.text: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks.
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks, without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs.

claims.text: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction do not fully analyze the possible interactions among various TFs.
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks, without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs.

claims.text: The authors investigate DNA TF binding site recognition as a multi-label classification problem.
claims.source_quote: In this paper we investigate DNA TF binding site recognition as a multi-label classification problem

claims.text: The proposed approach achieves reliable predictions for multiple TFs on DNA sequences retrieved from public repositories.
claims.source_quote: achieving reliable predictions for multiple TFs on DNA sequences retrieved in public repositories.

claims.text: The deep learning models used in this work are based on Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs).
claims.source_quote: Our deep learning models are based on Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs)

claims.text: The TCN-based models are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles simultaneously.
claims.source_quote: which are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles

claims.text: The TCN-based models capture correlations among TFs and their cooperative regulatory mechanisms.
claims.source_quote: capturing correlations among TFs and their cooperative regulatory mechanisms.

claims.text: Multi-label learning with reliable predictive performances can reveal biologically meaningful motifs and co-binding patterns consistent with known TF interactions.
claims.source_quote: multi-label learning leading to reliable predictive performances can reveal biologically meaningful motifs and co-binding patterns consistent with known TF interactions

claims.text: The multi-label approach also suggests novel relationships and cooperation among TFs beyond known interactions.
claims.source_quote: while also suggesting novel relationships and cooperation among TFs.
